channel.title: The Hindu UPSC Daily
channel.description: Daily UPSC current-affairs podcast built from The Hindu (Delhi edition). Hinglish narration with dated chronology and Mains-relevant analysis, for serious civil services aspirants.
channel.itunes:author: The Hindu UPSC Daily

item.title: The Hindu UPSC Daily — 3Jul
item.description: The Hindu UPSC Daily for 2026-07-03 -- current-affairs analysis from The Hindu.
